name: Part import option is not available when feature is disabled in part settings
steps:
Given the part import feature is disabled in part settings
Given a staff user is logged in and on the part list view
When the staff user inspects the action buttons above the parts table
Then the part import option is not visible

name: Staff member can import parts using the part list view wizard
steps:
Given the part import feature is enabled in part settings
Given a staff user is logged in and on the part list view
When the staff user locates the import option above the parts table and clicks it
Then the multi-stage data import wizard opens allowing field mapping from a spreadsheet or table-data format
